name: Creator Design System / Themes / Creator
description: Product theme for Zoho Creator. Overrides only surface, background, and layout tokens — never component styles or brand colours. Component values come from design-system/components/, foundation values come from design-system/foundations/.

doesNotApplyTo: brand anchor colours (Primary, Secondary, Tertiary at 500)
meta.subline: Surface and background tokens for Creator marketing pages. Components and brand stay sacred.

secondary.warning: Fails AA for body text — use only for placeholders, dividers, or borders.

usage.principle: Theme tokens override only surfaces, backgrounds, borders, and soft tints. Components and brand anchors are immutable.

rules.text: Use creator-* surface tokens for page and section backgrounds.
Use creator-brand-soft-* for hero gradient ends, soft section bands, and decorative tints.
Reference foundation tokens by their ID — never hardcode hex values that aren't in foundations/colours.json.
Override component colours (CTA red, Primary blue) from this file. Components come from design-system/components/.
Add new colour families here. New families belong in foundations/colours.json.
Use creator-text-secondary (#919191) for body copy — fails WCAG AA at 2.85:1.

notes: All values reference foundation tokens — never hard-coded outside the system.
Component colours (CTA red, Primary blue, Secondary red) are NOT in this file by design.
Add new surface or background tokens here as Creator pages introduce them.
When dark-mode Creator surfaces are added, create a separate creator-dark.json rather than mixing modes here.
